case_title: TEEVAN COMPANY DBA TEEVAN RESTORATION VS. DONALD PROPSTRA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEEVAN COMPANY DBA TEEVAN RESTORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROPSTRA, DONALD $32,136.69 PRINCIPAL, $342.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $32,479.19, ORIGINAL PROMISSORY NOTE STAMPED "JUDGMENT RENDERED HEREON".
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-20-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT DONALD PROPSTRA, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED TO SEP-08-2004 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 612 FOR LETTER.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEEVAN COMPANY DBA TEEVAN RESTORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PROPSTRA, DONALD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-20-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-05-2004
